header.name: Harsh Gupta
header.subtitle: ML / AGENTIC AI BUILDER • IIT GANDHINAGAR

profile.overviewText: AI/ML Engineer with 3 years of FinTech production experience — including a payment system handling 1M+ transactions/day under NPCI at 99.99% uptime. Now at IIT Gandhinagar building agentic AI systems that ship.

skills.name: Solved 500+ LeetCode Problems (DSA, Algorithms, System Design)

about.title: About
paragraphs: Three years ago, I was shipping payment systems that processed millions of transactions. Today, I'm building the AI layer that will power the next generation of them.

I made the leap from Software Engineering to AI/ML not because it was trendy, but because I kept hitting the ceiling of what rule-based systems could do. Now at IIT Gandhinagar's PGD-AI/ML program, I'm filling in the foundations while staying firmly hands-on — agentic pipelines, LLM applications, and backend systems that tie it all together.
What makes me different from most AI engineers: I understand production. I know what it means to build for scale, handle real transactions, and own outcomes — not just experiments.
500+ LeetCode problems isn't a flex. It's just how I stay sharp. I'm a problem-solver at core — give me an ambiguous challenge and I'll find the cleanest path through it.
When I'm not building: I'm teaching what I know (LinkedIn, conversations, wherever), trekking when the mountains call, and reading — a habit I owe entirely to IIT's library.

projectsSection.title: Projects
projectsSection.subtitle: Click More Detail to view more.

items.title: Jupiter AI - Autonomous AI Governance Auditor
items.description: An AI governance and security platform that discovers enterprise AI systems, generates policy-driven audit tests, analyzes execution traces, and identifies governance, security, privacy, and compliance risks with root-cause analysis.
items.coverImageAlt: Jupiter AI governance dashboard showing AI system discovery, governance graph, policy-driven testing, risk analysis, and trace-based root cause investigation.

detail.utilizedTool: Google ADK, LangGraph, Neo4j, Arize Phoenix, Gemini, FastAPI, Python, Knowledge Graphs, LLM-as-a-Judge
goalChallenge: Organizations deploy AI systems without a clear understanding of governance, security, privacy, and compliance risks.
Traditional AI observability tools provide traces and logs but fail to explain policy violations, root causes, and remediation paths.
Manual AI audits are time-consuming, expensive, and difficult to scale across rapidly evolving agentic and RAG-based systems.
whatIDid: Built a Discovery Engine that interviews stakeholders and automatically understands AI architectures, tools, data assets, knowledge sources, and security controls.
Designed a governance knowledge graph using Neo4j to model policies, controls, risks, assets, regulations, and AI system relationships.
Implemented Digital Twin generation to create governance-aware representations of enterprise AI systems.
Developed a policy-driven test generation engine that converts governance requirements into executable audit scenarios.
Integrated Arize Phoenix for trace collection, observability, evidence gathering, and root-cause analysis.
Implemented LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation pipelines to identify policy violations, risky behaviors, tool misuse, data leakage, and governance failures.
outcomeImpact: Reduced manual AI governance and audit effort by over 80% through automated discovery, testing, and evidence collection.
Enabled explainable governance audits by linking findings directly to policies, controls, risks, traces, and remediation recommendations.
Improved audit coverage through risk-based and policy-driven test generation instead of generic red-team prompts.
Provided actionable root-cause analysis by identifying the exact agent, tool, workflow, or document responsible for governance violations.
Accelerated enterprise AI risk assessments and compliance readiness through continuous and automated governance validation.

items.title: TenderLens AI
items.description: AI-powered tender eligibility and compliance evaluator.
items.coverImageAlt: TenderLens AI — AI evaluator branding: precision tender evaluation with neural-inspired circuitry

detail.utilizedTool: Python, LangGraph, FastAPI, ReactJS, Groq, OpenRouter, Celery, Redis
goalChallenge: Manual tender procurement review consumes significant time and expert effort.
Vendors struggle to understand exact eligibility criteria and missing compliance documents.
whatIDid: Built a multi-agent evaluation workflow for tender parsing, criteria extraction, submission comparison, and eligibility scoring.
Designed document intelligence pipelines that map uploaded submissions directly against tender criteria with evidence-backed compliance reporting.
outcomeImpact: Reduced manual procurement evaluation effort by over 80%.
Enabled instant eligibility checks with exact missing criteria and document-level compliance visibility.

items.title: AI Query Routing & Resolution System
items.description: Automates customer query routing and resolution using AI, reducing turnaround time from days to real-time.
items.coverImageAlt: Customer support dashboard — AI core routing user queries to departments and companies in real time

detail.utilizedTool: Python, Machine Learning, Gemini API, FastAPI, ReactJS, WebSockets
goalChallenge: Manual routing of customer queries across departments and companies causing delays up to 10 days.
Lack of real-time visibility and communication between customers, companies, and internal teams.
High operational overhead due to dependency on manual triaging and tracking systems.
whatIDid: Built an AI-driven system to classify and route queries to the correct department and company automatically.
Integrated LLM-based intent detection (Gemini) for dynamic and accurate query understanding.
Designed a real-time backend using FastAPI and WebSockets for instant query processing and updates.
Developed chatbot interfaces for both customers and companies to streamline query interaction.
Implemented multi-level routing logic and monitoring dashboards for end-to-end visibility.
outcomeImpact: Reduced query resolution time from 10 days to 1 day through intelligent automation.
Achieved zero manual effort in query routing, eliminating operational bottlenecks.
Improved routing accuracy and reduced misclassification with AI-based intent detection.
Enabled real-time tracking and communication, significantly enhancing user experience and efficiency.

items.title: IntelliGrad
items.description: Gamified AI learning platform with measurable scoring.
items.coverImageAlt: IntelliGrad student dashboard — achievements, milestones, and path to mastery

detail.utilizedTool: Python, LangChain, FastAPI, Vector Database, Guardrails, ReactJS
goalChallenge: Learning through LLM conversations provides knowledge but no measurable proof of progress.
Students need incentives, scoring, and visible rewards tied to learning quality.
whatIDid: Built conversational scoring pipelines that evaluate user-agent interactions and convert them into marks, rewards, and learning progression.
Implemented topic-specific guardrails and retrieval-backed evaluation to keep conversations focused and educational.
outcomeImpact: Created measurable AI-driven learning scores for otherwise untracked LLM interactions.
Maintained over 95% topic adherence through guided conversational learning flows.

commentedItems.title: BookWise AI
commentedItems.description: Advanced RAG chatbot for deep book learning and contextual Q&A.
commentedItems.coverImageAlt: BookWise AI — library scene with glowing book, brain icon, and contextual Q&A from chapters

detail.utilizedTool: Python, LangChain, FastAPI, Vector Database, BM25 Hybrid Retrieval, Cross-Encoder Re-ranking, Redis
goalChallenge: Traditional book chatbots struggle with deep contextual understanding, exact keyword retrieval, and long-form knowledge consistency.
Pure vector search often misses exact phrases, formulas, and structurally important sections while increasing token costs on large contexts.
whatIDid: Built a production-grade RAG system using structural chunking, recursive chunking, and semantic chunking strategies based on document type and retrieval intent.
Implemented hybrid retrieval combining keyword search and semantic vector search, followed by re-ranking to surface the most relevant passages before LLM generation.
Optimized prompt pipelines with context compression, selective retrieval, and efficient LLM orchestration to improve answer quality while reducing token consumption.
outcomeImpact: Improved retrieval precision by over 30% compared to vector-only search on benchmark queries.
Reduced unnecessary LLM context usage by nearly 40% while maintaining high-quality grounded responses.

items.company: National e-Governance Division (NeGD), MeitY — Govt. of India
highlights: Reduced data entry time from 3-4 hrs to seconds
Accelerated client communication from 3-4 days to same-day
Built dynamic real-time update system replacing manual workflows

Change propagation to stakeholders took 3-4 days causing delays in critical government operations
whatIDid: Designed and developed internal dynamic dashboard for Ministry budget allocation and infrastructure management

items.company: Plutos ONE (FinTech Startup) — BBPS / NPCI Integration
highlights: Improved transaction success rate from 80% to 99.99%
Designed Hold-N-Post fault-tolerance system for unreliable biller APIs
Auto-scaling queue architecture cut pods from 6-7 to 2 at peak load

detail.utilizedTool: Java, Spring WebFlux (Reactive), Kafka, Kubernetes, REST APIs, Microservices
goalChallenge: Building BBPS under NPCI processing 1M+ bill payments/day via UPI apps (GPay, PhonePe) for major national billers
20% of valid transactions incorrectly rejected at launch due to biller API latency violating NPCI SLA time windows
Startup resource constraints required efficient auto-scaling under unpredictable peak loads
whatIDid: Solely owned transaction middleware layer between NPCI and downstream billers — most critical pipeline component
Designed Hold-N-Post fault-tolerance pattern: immediately ACK-ing NPCI within SLA window then asynchronously retrying biller APIs at configurable intervals
Architected round-robin dynamic queue system with auto-scaling based on real-time load metrics
Reduced active pod count from 6-7 at peak to 2 pods while sustaining full throughput
outcomeImpact: Drove transaction success rate from 80% to 99.99% on a 1M+ transactions/day system
Achieved full NPCI SLA compliance
Auto-scaling architecture sustained peak load on 2 pods vs prior 6-7 — approx 70% infrastructure cost reduction
Zero-downtime resilience for state electricity boards and national billers across India

highlights: Built RESTful APIs for e-commerce and construction management platforms
Delivered end-to-end portal solutions across two industry verticals
Developed backend services for antique marketplace app

goalChallenge: Build reliable API infrastructure and portals for clients in antique e-commerce and construction project management
Required translating distinct business domains into scalable backend architecture
whatIDid: Designed RESTful APIs for antique marketplace mobile app handling product listings, search, and transaction flows
Built full construction work management portal for project tracking, resource allocation, and progress reporting
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to gather requirements and ship production-ready features
outcomeImpact: Delivered two client-facing products across different industry verticals in first year of professional experience
Established strong API design and backend fundamentals that carried into high-scale FinTech work at Plutos ONE
